chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C. P. No. S – 132 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For order as to non-prosecution 18.09.2025 ---------- None present for petitioner. No intimation is received. A cautionary order was passed on last date in light of non-attendance of petitioner and his counsel. Dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Ashraf
